HGSS.354.0000:
Only Trainers who have proven
themselves may pass.\f
Oh! The eight Badges of Johto!
Please, go right on through!
HGSS.354.0001:
This way leads to
Mt. Silver.\f
You’ll see scary-strong Pokémon
out there.\r
You’re not ready for it.
HGSS.354.0002:
This way leads to
Mt. Silver.\f
You’ll see scary-strong Pokémon
out there.\r
You’re not ready for it.\f
HGSS.354.0003:
This way leads to
Mt. Silver.\f
You’ll see scary-strong Pokémon
out there.\f
But you should be all right.
Just watch out for yourself.
HGSS.354.0004:
Huh?
This way leads to Kanto...\r
But this path’s blocked for\r
the time being, I’m afraid.
HGSS.354.0005:
Hold there!\f
This way leads to Kanto...
But this path’s blocked for\r
the time being, I’m afraid.\f
HGSS.354.0006:
West to Mt. Silver.
East to the Kanto region.\f
Go north for the Elite Four!
But you should know that already,\r
since you defeated the Champion!
HGSS.354.0007:
Janine: I’m on the way to my dad’s
house to give him his lunch.\f
The Elite Four has no time to rest,
day or night. It’s such hard work,\r
you know?\f
Say!
Do you want to exchange numbers? [0200,0000]
HGSS.354.0009:
Janine: Call me on Monday around noon
if you want to battle!
HGSS.354.0010:
Janine: You don’t look like you’re
scared, but you are, aren’t you?
HGSS.354.0011:
Janine: Now you want to know
my number, don’t you? [0200,0000]
HGSS.354.0012:
Janine: I’m done taking lunch to
my dad, and now I’m on my way home.\f
Do you want to take a picture
with me? [0200,0000]
HGSS.354.0013:
Janine: Can you look as cool as me
for the picture?\f
HGSS.354.0014:
Janine: Don’t you think we look
good in the picture?
HGSS.354.0016:
Your Photo Album is full.\f
Access your PC and delete
some pictures.
